security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Privacy-first modular voice assistant desktop shell.
bundle.longDescription: Aurora desktop packages the official Tauri 2 shell with a constrained AuroraClient bridge, signed updater artifacts, and an explicitly prepared local sidecar binary for Desktop Local mode.
